# btpservice_cicd_credentials (Data Source)

Lists all credentials in the SAP BTP CI/CD service. Passwords are never returned by the API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_credentials" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the resource (assigned by the API).
- `values` (Attributes List) The list of credentials. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the credential.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the credential.
- `name` (String) The name of the credential.
